title: Looking for a fansite for a friend
display_title: Looking for a fansite for a friend
wikitext:
[]: Looking for a fansite for a friend.             Quote Post by Princess Asuka » Thu Dec 26, 2013 2:18 am A friend of mine mentioned the site Ayanami.nu circa 98-00 had a bunch NGE fanart and stuff. If any knows anything please let me know, It would make my friend happy.

[]:             Quote Post by tzigi » Thu Dec 26, 2013 5:01 am That's precisely what archive.org is for: [url]https://web.archive.org/web/19990901000000%2A/http://Ayanami.nu[/url] The forum has a problem with creating an actual link from this so just copy it to your browser.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Dec 26, 2013 5:44 am I fixed the link so it's clickable -- you have to URL-encode the * for phpBB to not treat it as a stop character.

[]:             Quote Post by Princess Asuka » Sun Dec 29, 2013 10:47 pm The link isn't working. I tried copy/paste into my browser and it wouldn't work for me.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Dec 30, 2013 6:03 pm Try this -- it may not be the last capture when it was a Rei shrine but it's close to the last one. Otherwise explore earlier captures on the bar at the top of the page.

[]:             Quote Post by Princess Asuka » Mon Dec 30, 2013 8:09 pm Thank you, Mr. Tines. I think this will make my friend very happy that I found it for him.
